text: Good morning! Can you pull up today's calendar and reminders?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, December 14. No work meetings today. You have neighborhood BBQ at Dave's place and Sarah wanting to work on her design course.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick log: Planning our weekly meals today. We need to stock up on milk, coffee, and chicken. The kids are always hungry.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Logged that. I've got the grocery list ready. I've updated the Costco list and added diapers as we're running low. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hey Jarvis, We went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. Lily's gymnastics class signup opens online tomorrow. It's great to see them having fun.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Logged that. I've got the schedule covered. I've added the signup time to your alerts so you can secure a spot. Go Frisco FC!
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Listening to a podcast in the garage. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Sure thing! I've adjusted the local settings. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Toddlers are full of energy. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that the smart-home hub is acting up today. I think the spark plug on the mower is dirty. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Automations are great when they work. I can look up a quick spark plug cleaning guide for your mower model. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Played golf with Jake Morrison today. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. It is nice to unwind with friends.
title: Social Update

text: Interesting. I've noted the plans. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. Have a great time!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Wrote a custom vector memory index tool. Scraping astrophotography files from Hubble. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Space science and tech is a great focus. Hubble raw FITS files are great. I'll track the download folder sync. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Planning our weekly meals today. Grilling steaks and chicken on the deck tonight. The kids are always hungry.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: I've got the grocery list ready. Perfect grilling weather! I've added hickory chips to the Costco list. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick log: We went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. Ethan's team played a match and won 2-1! It's a busy schedule but worth it.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Logged that. Great progress. What a great win for Frisco FC! He's showing real growth on defense. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Listening to a podcast in the garage. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Got it, Mike. Good way to wrap up the day. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Sarah is planning a playdate for Ethan. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Screen time is always a negotiation. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that the smart-home hub is acting up today. I adjusted the automated lighting sensors to save energy. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Interesting. Let's get that resolved. Smart move. I've updated the Jarvis automation dim rules after 9 PM. I'll update the home maintenance log.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick log: Having dinner with our friends tonight. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. It is nice to unwind with friends.
title: Social Update

text: Got it, Mike. Social breaks are great. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Soldering custom sensors in the garage. Curiosity and Perseverance RTG decay rates differ. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Logged that. I've indexed the research notes. MMRTG heat management is complex. I've archived your propulsion notes. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Time to log today's thoughts, Jarvis. Good weekend progress on home projects. Had a great catch-up with the neighbors. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal logged, Mike. Rest well and I'll see you tomorrow.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
